title: balsamita audibertii
intro: Balsamita audibertii, also known as Catmint or Spurred Catmint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that aid in wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Balsamita audibertii include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and supporting respiratory health, particularly for those with bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Balsamita audibertii are typically dried or infused in tea, used as a tincture, or applied topically as a poultice to reap its medicinal benefits.
